title: Eğitim-Öğretim Bağlamında Kültürel Sermayeyi Konu Edinen Lisansüstü Tezlerin İncelenmesi
author: Sülun vd.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: In the research, it is aimed to examine the results of the research related to the subject of cultural capital in Turkey. For this purpose, document analysis was preferred as a method in the research. The scope of the research consists of 18 postgraduate theses published between 2015-2022. The keyword "cultural capital" was used to collect the data. YÖK national thesis scanning center database was used to determine the studies to be included in the research. While determining the studies within the scope of the research, the sample was determined according to the criterion sampling method, which is one of the purposive sampling methods. The criteria in the study; It was determined that it was made by Turkish researchers in Turkey, the sample was within the borders of Turkey, it included the word cultural capital, and the method was clearly stated. Each study was analyzed and examined in terms of purpose, type of thesis, type of sample, sample groups, sample size, method, research model, data collection tools and results. Examined postgraduate theses were analyzed by content analysis. In the research, it was determined that more than half of the postgraduate theses that deal with the cultural capital issue on the basis of education and training, the sample group consisted of teachers. In addition, it was determined that quantitative research methods were preferred as a method, the relational survey model as a model, stratified sampling as a sample type, a sample size of 500 or more as a sample size, and scales as a data collection tool in most of them. In addition to these, it has been determined that the subject of cultural capital has been examined in 12 different universities in the last seven years on the basis of education.
